_note: Recruiter pitch templates for Layer 6. One is selected and rendered in a LinkedIn-style card. Slots are {{construct_name}}.

templates.pitch_template: Quick note — your profile reads like a strong AE. {{initial_trust_propensity}} on the first call, {{adaptation_rate}} on the second. We have a midmarket seat opening in two weeks. Open to a chat?

Reaching out because your profile reads {{deliberation}} with {{working_memory_span}} recall — the kind of profile we want on our backend platform. Hybrid, senior, equity refresh annually. Worth a 20-minute call?
Hi — your profile reads {{sustained_attention}} with {{performance_under_load}} composure. We are staffing a program manager role across three regional teams. Twenty-five percent travel. Interested?

Hello — your read on social context is {{attribution_style}} and your reset under pressure is {{frustration_tolerance}}. We are hiring a senior CSM for an enterprise pod. Fully remote. Worth a quick exchange?
Brief note — your profile reads {{utilitarian_leaning}} with {{deliberation}} on tradeoffs. We are recruiting a director of business operations. Reporting to the COO. Open to learning more?
